description: Address code review feedback: fix stock API breaking change in frontend, fix rate limiter key bypass, add documentation to rate limiter and auth module, fix OpenAI config to throw unconditionally
steps: Update src/app/(dashboard)/stok/page.tsx to handle new paginated response shape from GET /api/stok (use .items from response)
Fix rate limiter key in src/app/api/agent/chat/route.ts and src/app/api/agent/chat/stream/route.ts to use request IP instead of client-controlled sessionId
Add JSDoc comment to RateLimiter class in src/lib/rate-limiter.ts documenting in-memory limitation
Add JSDoc comment to module-level throw in src/lib/auth.ts documenting fail-fast behavior
Fix src/lib/langchain/config.ts to throw unconditionally when OPENAI_API_KEY is not set
acceptance_criteria: Frontend stok page correctly accesses .items from paginated API response
Rate limiter key uses server-controlled IP, not client-supplied sessionId
RateLimiter class has JSDoc explaining in-memory limitation and recommendation for Redis/Upstash in production
Auth module has JSDoc explaining fail-fast behavior
getOpenAIConfig() and getEmbeddingConfig() throw unconditionally when OPENAI_API_KEY is not set
Project builds successfully with npx next build
findings: All 5 review issues addressed. NextRequest.ip is not available in Next.js 16, so rate limit key uses x-forwarded-for and x-real-ip headers instead. Frontend stok page uses data.items with fallback to data for backward compatibility. Build passes, all 25 tests pass.
